caption: An older man with gray hair and glasses stands before a microphone, speaking against a backdrop of brown horizontal blinds. He is wearing a light blue patterned shirt with yellow and green accents and a beaded necklace. Throughout the sequence, the man is gesturing with his hands as he speaks, moving from open palms to clasped hands. A black microphone is positioned close to his face. In each frame, a white rectangular box containing the text "ORCA" is visible on the right side of the screen. The scene remains static in terms of location and composition, with only the man's facial expressions and hand movements changing slightly as the sequence progresses.
